page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g6r.16xlarge is an ARM64-based general-purpose server instance powered by a 64-core Ampere Altra processor running at 2.8 GHz. It features 64 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, eliminating hyperthreading resource sharing. The instance is equipped with 256 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4 GB of memory per core. It does not include local storage or GPU hardware, relying on network-attached storage and featuring a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks demonstrate strong multi-core capabilities, with stress-ng multi-core and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression scoring in the top tier. Memory bandwidth is also a highlight, showing strong read-only performance for both small cached blocks and large uncached blocks. However, single-core performance is moderate, as evidenced by average stress-ng single-core results and weak single-threaded bzip3 decompression. Redis SET operations perform exceptionally well, reaching 82.33 million operations per second.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ARM64 architecture offers high resource density and power efficiency, making it a viable alternative to x86 instances for multi-threaded workloads. The lack of bundled local storage and GPUs keeps the baseline resource profile focused on compute and memory. This instance is well-suited for multi-threaded applications, containerized microservices, Redis caching layers, and general-purpose web serving.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g6r.16xlarge is an ARM64 general-purpose server powered by a 64-core Ampere Altra processor running at 2.8 GHz. Featuring 64 dedicated physical cores with one thread per core and 256 GB of RAM, this instance delivers a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-memory ratio. It lacks local storage and GPU accelerators but provides a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps. Benchmark results highlight strong multi-core performance and high memory read bandwidth, alongside exceptional Redis SET throughput of 82.33 million operations per second. Conversely, single-threaded performance remains average. The ARM64 architecture provides qualitative cost-efficiency benefits for highly parallelized workloads. This server is suited for multi-threaded applications, Redis caching, and containerized microservices.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g6r.16xlarge is an ARM64 general-purpose server featuring 64 dedicated Ampere Altra cores, 256 GB RAM, and 16 Gbps network bandwidth, optimized for highly parallelized workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g6r.16xlarge is an ARM64 general-purpose server with 64 dedicated Ampere Altra cores and 256 GB RAM, built for multi-threaded workloads.
tagline: An ARM64-powered general-purpose server featuring sixty-four dedicated cores and balanced memory for highly parallelized, multi-threaded workloads.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated Ampere Altra ARM64 physical cores running at 2.8 GHz
256 GB of system memory providing 4 GB per core
Strong multi-core processing and high memory read bandwidth
16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage
Suited for Redis caching, containerized microservices, and multi-threaded applications
